blockingIssues.description: Extension selection still hydrates running bridge scoops only from persisted SessionStore state, so partial text/tool-start events emitted before the user clicks the scoop row can remain invisible; callback forwarding alone does not satisfy VAL-SPAWN-016.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to document the extension selection-time hydration invariant: callback forwarding alone is insufficient unless pre-selection offscreen buffer state is persisted or replayed on scoop selection.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For extension-side chat/persistence fixes, require at least one automated or manual verification where output or tool-start occurs before the user selects the scoop row, so selection-time hydration is exercised end to end instead of only callback plumbing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-agent-bridge-chat-panel-wiring found that the new tests stopped at Orchestrator callback spies, while the remaining failure was specifically the pre-selection extension flow: UI selection still hydrates only from SessionStore and does not replay already-buffered offscreen events. See .factory/validation/core-followup-2/scrutiny/reviews/fix-agent-bridge-chat-panel-wiring.json.
